verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Confitebor tibi, Domine, in toto corde meo,  in consilio justorum, et congregatione.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ אוֹדֶ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה בְּכׇל־לֵבָ֑ב בְּס֖וֹד יְשָׁרִ֣ים וְעֵדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will praise thee, O Lord, with my whole heart; in the council of the just, and in the congregation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Halleluja! Minä kiitän Herraa kaikesta sydämestäni, hurskasten neuvossa ja seurakunnassa.
verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord. I will praise the Lord with my whole heart, in the assembly of the upright, and in the congregation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Magna opera Domini :  exquisita in omnes voluntates ejus.
verses.douay_rheims: Great are the works of the Lord: sought out according to all his wills.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suuret ovat Herran työt: joka niistä ottaa vaarin, hänellä on sula riemu niistä.
verses.king_james: The works of the Lord are great, sought out of all them that have pleasure therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confessio et magnificentia opus ejus,  et justitia ejus manet in sæculum sæculi.
verses.douay_rheims: His work is praise and magnificence: and his justice continueth for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä hän asettaa, se on kunniallinen ja jalo, ja hänen vanhurskautensa pysyy ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: His work is honourable and glorious: and his righteousness endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Memoriam fecit mirabilium suorum,  misericors et miserator Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֵ֣כֶר עָ֭שָׂה לְנִפְלְאוֹתָ֑יו חַנּ֖וּן וְרַח֣וּם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hath made a remembrance of his wonderful works, being a merciful and gracious Lord:
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän on säätänyt ihmeittensä muiston: armollinen ja laupias on Herra.
verses.king_james: He hath made his wonderful works to be remembered: the Lord is gracious and full of compassion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Escam dedit timentibus se ;  memor erit in sæculum testamenti sui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טֶ֭רֶף נָתַ֣ן לִירֵאָ֑יו יִזְכֹּ֖ר לְעוֹלָ֣ם בְּרִיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hath given food to them that fear him. He will be mindful for ever of his covenant:
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän antaa ruan pelkääväisillensä: hän muistaa liittonsa ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: He hath given meat unto them that fear him: he will ever be mindful of his covenant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Virtutem operum suorum annuntiabit populo suo,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֣חַ מַ֭עֲשָׂיו הִגִּ֣יד לְעַמּ֑וֹ לָתֵ֥ת לָ֝הֶ֗ם נַחֲלַ֥ת גּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He will shew forth to his people the power of his works.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän ilmoittaa kansallensa väkevät työnsä, antaaksensa heille pakanain perimisen.
verses.king_james: He hath shewed his people the power of his works, that he may give them the heritage of the heathen.

verses.latin_vulgate: ut det illis hæreditatem gentium.  Opera manuum ejus veritas et judicium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַעֲשֵׂ֣י יָ֭דָיו אֱמֶ֣ת וּמִשְׁפָּ֑ט נֶ֝אֱמָנִ֗ים כׇּל־פִּקּוּדָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: That he may give them the inheritance of the Gentiles: the works of his hands are truth and judgment.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen kättensä työt ovat totuus ja oikeus: kaikki hänen käskynsä ovat toimelliset.
verses.king_james: The works of his hands are verity and judgment; all his commandments are sure.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fidelia omnia mandata ejus,  confirmata in sæculum sæculi,  facta in veritate et æquitate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סְמוּכִ֣ים לָעַ֣ד לְעוֹלָ֑ם עֲ֝שׂוּיִ֗ם בֶּאֱמֶ֥ת וְיָשָֽׁר׃
verses.douay_rheims: All his commandments are faithful: confirmed for ever and ever, made in truth and equity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne pysyvät vahvana aina ja ijankaikkisesti: ne ovat tehdyt totuudessa ja oikeudessa.
verses.king_james: They stand fast for ever and ever, and are done in truth and uprightness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Redemptionem misit populo suo ;  mandavit in æternum testamentum suum.  Sanctum et terribile nomen ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פְּד֤וּת ׀ שָׁ֘לַ֤ח לְעַמּ֗וֹ צִוָּֽה־לְעוֹלָ֥ם בְּרִית֑וֹ קָד֖וֹשׁ וְנוֹרָ֣א שְׁמֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: He hath sent redemption to his people: he hath commanded his covenant for ever. Holy and terrible is his name:
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän lähetti kansallensa lunastuksen, hän lupaa liittonsa pysymään ijankaikkisesti: pyhä ja peljättävä on hänen nimensä.
verses.king_james: He sent redemption unto his people: he hath commanded his covenant for ever: holy and reverend is his name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Initium sapientiæ timor Domini ;  intellectus bonus omnibus facientibus eum :  laudatio ejus manet in sæculum sæculi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רֵ֘אשִׁ֤ית חׇכְמָ֨ה ׀ יִרְאַ֬ת יְהֹוָ֗ה שֵׂ֣כֶל ט֭וֹב לְכׇל־עֹֽשֵׂיהֶ֑ם תְּ֝הִלָּת֗וֹ עֹמֶ֥דֶת לָעַֽד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom. A good understanding to all that do it: his praise continueth for ever and ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herran pelko on viisauden alku: se on hyvä ymmärrys kaikille, jotka sen tekevät: hänen kiitoksensa pysyy ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom: a good understanding have all they that do his commandments: his praise endureth for ever.
